problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Vagus. Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
